THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROSS, ERNESTINE ROSS, JOHN $14,550.72 PRINCIPAL, $1,800.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $4,065.00 INTEREST, $130.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $20,545.72, JUDGMENT PAYABLE BY $250/MONTHLY INSTALLMENTS STARTING 2/1/95. IF TIMELY MADE & NO DEFAULT, PLTF SHALL WAIVE ITS CLAIM TO THE $4,065 INTEREST, $1,800 ATTYS FEES AND COSTS OF $130. SEE JUDGMENT FOR FURTHER DETAILS.
